About the Company

NVIDIA is a computing platform company innovating at the intersection of graphics, HPC and AI. The company specialises in the manufacture of graphics processor technologies for workstations, desktop computers, and mobile devices. The company is a major supplier of integrated circuits used for personal computer motherboard chipsets, graphics

processing units (GPUs), and game consoles.

Phone Number +1 140-848-6200
Contact Email info@nvidia.com
Related Hubs NVIDIA Alumni Founded Companies, NVIDIA Portfolio Companies

Products & Services

NVIDIA Blackwell Architecture GPUs
A GPU architecture designed for AI, HPC, and graphics workloads, providing computational acceleration for various applications.
NVIDIA DGX Systems
Integrated AI supercomputing systems optimized for enterprise AI and HPC workloads, combining GPUs, software, and networking.

Actively Used Products

96NVIDIA uses 96 technology products and services including HTML5, jQuery, and  Google Doubleclick, according to G2 Stack.
Data source:

Active Website Tech Count

164NVIDIA is actively using 164 technologies for its website, according to BuiltWith. These include DNSSEC, Cloudflare CDN, and  Cloudflare.
Data source:

Total IP

5,878The intellectual property of NVIDIA includes 5,550 registered patents primarily in the 'Computing; Calculating' category, according to IPqwery. Additionally, NVIDIA has registered 328 trademarks with the most popular class being 'Scientific and electric apparatus and instruments', according to IPqwery.
